subject: [PATCH pynfs v2 16/25] server41tests: test CHANGE_DIR_ATTRS notification

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a test case to the server41tests module in the Linux kernel's NFSv4 implementation. The test, called 'testDirDelegDirAttrs', verifies that the server sends a CHANGE_DIR_ATTRS notification when directory attributes are changed. To do this, it requests a delegation with specific notifications enabled, creates a file from another client, and checks for the presence of a CHANGE_DIR_ATTRS event among the changes received by the first client. The test also checks that the notification contains valid directory attributes.
